reviews.comment:
My first ever window tint job came out AMAZING!! Sharyn and Joe were true professionals. They took the time to sit down and listen to my goals of the job (yes, a bit silly but I was pretty specific on what I wanted) and make recommendations based on my needs. They were super efficient and knowledgable--you could tell they have been doing this for awhile.

I noticed an instant difference from the tint. Later in the day I had my car parked in the heat for awhile, and it was significantly cooler than on a normal day. It also seemed to cool off with the AC about 10x faster.

So excited to take my first long road trip with a tint to test it out!! Definitely recommend Frederick Window Tinting for all your tinting needs.

reviewReply.comment: Thank you Jenn for coming in and leaving us such a wonderful review!

reviews.name: accounts/114723450049664810853/locations/10123051285004451502/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnb2NfQXl3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Over priced. After proceeding to rush us because we needed to run to the bank, we decided to go else where.
We never told them we were going anywhere else. We went to AMG Window Tinting & soon after noticed a car from FWT that was circling AMG. My friend then got a shady text from the women who proceeded to say "I'm sure AMG is doing a great job". Such bad business.

reviewReply.comment: Writing a 1 star review for someone else is disappointing. After your friend arrived late to the initial appointment, she decided to upgrade to our Ultra XP film to which she didn't bring enough money for. Upon attempting to run her card for the difference and it being declined she stated she were going to run to the atm. We waited for 35 minutes and finally sent her a message inquiring if she intended on coming back because we were going to leave for the day. She responded that she understood and hit traffic and would come back a different day. Ironically, we happened to be driving by AMG Window Tinting and to our surprise, saw her and the vehicle there. Over priced and not being able afford something are two very different things. We would have appreciated simply honesty rather than waste more of our time with the lies.

reviews.name: accounts/114723450049664810853/locations/10123051285004451502/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBLXVmT0RnEAE

reviews.comment: I took my brand new 2017 Corvette Grand Sport in for window tinting and paint protection film.  Also noteworthy is the fact that the film was supposed to have a 7 year national warranty through Sungard but when I asked for the official completed warranty certificate with dealer stamp I was told " We don't have any warranty forms because we cover everything in house" I was then promised the official form but that was never delivered. The initial contact for scheduling was swift and convenient through text messages. The customer experience was excellent until the problems with the paint protection film started. On parts of the vehicle the edges were not properly adhering causing dirt and debris to get underneath and create the potential for paint damage. I took my car back once to get the issues resolved and per the owners request even agreed to let them keep it a day or two to allow the film to dry before driving the vehicle. Dropped the vehicle off Sunday night and I was getting called Monday afternoon to pick it back up after I already agreed that the vehicle could stay until Tuesday to allow more time for the paint protection film to dry. A few days later after some heavy rain the problems started again, edges not sticking allowing dirt and sediment underneath, additionally I started to notice bubbling and other imperfections in other areas, mainly the front bumper. Contacted the owners again and requested the film be removed and a refund provided because I didn't buy paint protection film to cause damage to my paint.  After making that request all communications ceased and I never received a response until I filed a dispute with my credit card company. They then scheduled an appointment to address the issues yet again and removed some of the defective pieces and offered a tint job on another of my vehicles to partially compensate me, after about a week the passenger site window of the vehicle that I received the complimentary tint job started to peel and I contacted them via text message to get it corrected but again several days went by again with no response so I opened another credit card dispute. I will never go to this vendor again, I am supposed to have a warranty on the poor paint film installation and the tint job but I doubt they will honor this and honestly I never want to go there again.

reviewReply.comment:
Hi Antonio, this is Sharyn replying. I want to first start by thanking you for choosing us. I will start my reply to owning up to you and those viewing this reply and say that we did experience minor issues with your paint protection film after installation. That part of your review was accurate. What you chose to leave out though, is how Joe and I both bent over in every way possible to try and satisfy you, make the situation right and have you being a satisfied customer. Starting with texting you for over four hours after your initial contact until after 10pm on a weeknight. We then met you at our shop on a Friday evening (in which Joe worked until 11pm) and than came in on his day off the following day to complete the job. To thank you for your business and for choosing our shop, we included several  additional pieces at no charge to you (the rockers, mirrors and head lights)

When you alerted us that the pieces were having issues and some were lifting, Joe got out of bed and met you at the shop on a Sunday evening at 9:15pm. We asked that your vehicle be left until Tuesday to dry. You were willing to, that part was correct. We even offered to lend you one of our personal vehicles OR rent you a vehicle from Enterprise, as we had your daily driver. The  reason we decided not to keep it until Tuesday was because Joe had stayed at the shop until 1am on Sunday working out the pieces that were lifting.

You then messaged in the second time that it was still lifting. I specifically asked you what I could do to make you happy and make the situation right. You did ask for the film to be removed and refunded. Your accusation that at that point all communication ceased is a bold face lie. I replied immediately to you, setting you up for a Saturday appointment, which I had to text you THREE times about to confirm, because the replies had ceased from you. When you came back in that Saturday, the  option to receive the full refund and have the film removed was still on the table. Upon discussing other alternative options, we came to the agreement that the main issue stemmed from our film being laid over top of the factory film. We came to the agreement that it would be best to remove the one section you had paid for and one of the complimentary pieces. As compensation, we offered you the partial refund for the film that was removed or the option to tint your new daily driver in our top of the line ceramic film. You accepted the $650 tint job in lieu of the $400 cash refund. You trusted us enough at that point to pick up your vehicle and drop it back off to you to save you the trip.

You messaged in weeks later that one corner began to lift on the new daily driver. I will admit, I took 3 days to get back to you, I hadn't seen your message until you sent the follow up. When I saw that message, we told you we would take care of it and even offered to again pick it up from your house and drop it back off to you. I never heard from you again after that. From the time we tinted your new vehicle in May, until that last message weeks later, we had not heard anything regarding the PPF. I have text messages to back up all the details I provided. After putting over 30 hours of blood, sweat and tears into this project, It truly upsets me to hear lies about our company. We did every thing we could to try to satisfy you. In addition to the services you paid for, you received $1,200 in additional services that we provided through out your experience with us.

reviews.comment: Three years ago I had my wife's car tinted at Frederick Window Tinting and we have been extremely pleased. This week I decided to take my own car for the same and it looks terrific. I would definitely recommend Frederick Window Tinting to anyone who wants a quality job that will stand up to time and outdoor parking. The ceramic film does an excellent job of cutting down on the heat inside the car and protecting the upholstery and dash.

reviews.comment: Stop shopping around. If you need window tint, Frederick Window Tinting is the only place you need to go hands down. My BMW 640i Gran Coupe turned out amazing!! From the customer service for an appointment, the time and price, and then the finished product are second to none. Joe and Sharyn have really made my experiences tinting my car windows into a great one. This is my 3rd car with Joe and Sharyn and I will not take my car anywhere else. Their attention to detail and true care for customer satisfaction makes Frederick Window Tinting the place to go. You have a loyal customer for life!! Thank you for all that you do!
